name: Daily Mortgage News Digest (Gemini + Google Sheets)

nodes.name: 6 AM Daily (Mon–Fri)
nodes.notes: Runs at 6:00 AM Pacific time (n8n instance timezone set to PT). Weekdays only. For 7 days use: 0 6 * * *.

nodes.name: Fetch Active Subscribers
nodes.notes: Reads all rows where active=TRUE from the Subscribers tab. References columns by header name so adding columns never breaks this node.

nodes.name: Generate Digest via Gemini
nodes.notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro with Google Search grounding. 20 sources across mortgage, real estate, macro, and financial media. Expanded JSON schema includes realtorSection per story.

nodes.name: Parse & Validate Digest
nodes.notes: Extracts JSON from Gemini multi-part responses. Gemini with Search grounding returns reasoning text + JSON; this finds the JSON via ```json fence, any fence, or first-brace-to-last-brace, ignoring the reasoning prose.

nodes.name: Validate & Fix Story Links
nodes.notes: Link Validator v3. Uses this.helpers.httpRequest (v2 used $helpers.request which silently failed, forcing all links to Google fallback). GET with browser headers; treats 403/405/429 as live (site blocking bots, link is real); keeps unverifiable links instead of discarding. Only genuine 404/410 trigger Gemini re-search then Google fallback.

nodes.name: Plagiarism Check
nodes.notes: Checks summary/keyPoints/effects/realtorSection (NOT headlines) against open-access sources for 8+ word verbatim matches. Separates clean stories from flagged ones. Flagged stories go to Rewrite Agent. Clean stories pass through in digest.stories.

nodes.name: Rewrite Agent
nodes.notes: Receives flagged stories from Plagiarism Check. Calls Gemini to rewrite only the flagged fields — headline, source, and URL are always preserved. Merges rewritten stories back with clean stories and passes to Build HTML Email. Option B: always sends after rewrite.

parameters.jsCode:
const digest = $input.first().json; // JWH Financial brand palette const BRAND = { navy: '#0D1321', blue: '#3B6FE8', green: '#22C55E', red: '#DC2626', pageBg: '#EEF0F5', cardBg: '#FFFFFF', border: '#E2E5EC', textPrimary: '#0D1321', textSecondary: '#4B5563', textMuted: '#9CA3AF', effectsBg: '#EEF2FF', effectsBorder: '#C7D2FE', }; // Source badge colors — all in brand navy or blue family const SOURCE_COLORS = { 'HousingWire': '#1E3A8A', 'Mortgage News Daily': '#1E40AF', 'MBS Live': '#C2410C', 'National Mortgage Professional': '#5B21B6', 'Federal Reserve': '#065F46', 'CFPB': '#166534', 'Freddie Mac': '#1D4ED8', 'Fannie Mae': '#1E3A8A', 'Mortgage Bankers Association': '#9F1239', 'National Association of Realtors': '#1D4ED8', 'Bloomberg': '#C2410C', 'Wall Street Journal': '#0D1321', }; const CATEGORY_EMOJI = { rates: '📈', mbs: '📊', housing: '🏠', fed: '🏦', regulatory: '📋', gse: '🏛️', lender: '🏢', economy: '💼', }; const getSourceColor = (source) => { for (const [key, color] of Object.entries(SOURCE_COLORS)) { if (source.toLowerCase().includes(key.toLowerCase())) return color; } return BRAND.navy; }; // Rate table const rateRows = (digest.marketSnapshot?.rates || []).map(r => { const isUp = r.change && r.change.startsWith('+'); const isDown = r.change && r.change.startsWith('-'); const changeColor = isUp ? BRAND.red : isDown ? BRAND.green : BRAND.textMuted; const changeBg = isUp ? '#FEF2F2' : isDown ? '#F0FDF4' : '#F9FAFB'; return ` ${r.label} ${r.value} ${r.change || '—'} `; }).join(''); // Story cards const storyCards = digest.stories.map((story) => { const borderColor = getSourceColor(story.source); const isTop = story.importance === 'high'; const emoji = CATEGORY_EMOJI[story.category] || ''; const keyPointsHtml = story.keyPoints?.length ? ` ${story.keyPoints.map(p => ``).join('')}
·${p}
` : ''; const effects = story.effects; const effectsHtml = effects?.hasEffects ? `
Market Implications

⚡ Immediate

${(effects.firstOrder || []).map(e => `

· ${e}

`).join('')}

〜 Downstream

${(effects.secondOrder || []).map(e => `

· ${e}

`).join('')}
` : ''; // Realtor section const rs = story.realtorSection; const realtorHtml = rs?.hasRealtorAngle ? `
🏡 For Realtors & Agents

${rs.summary}

${(rs.actionables || []).map(a => `

→ ${a}

`).join('')}
` : ''; const linkHtml = story.sourceUrl ? `Read full story →` : ''; return `
 
${story.source} ${isTop ? ` ★ Top Story` : ''} ${emoji ? ` ${emoji}` : ''}

${story.headline}

${story.summary}

${keyPointsHtml} ${effectsHtml} ${realtorHtml} ${linkHtml}
`; }).join(''); // Watch list const watchItems = (digest.watchList || []).map((item, i) => `
${i+1} ${item}
` ).join(''); const UNSUBSCRIBE_WEBHOOK = 'https://jwhfinancial.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/digest-unsubscribe'; const html = ` ${digest.subject || 'Daily Mortgage & Real Estate Digest'}
 

JWH Financial · Daily Briefing · ${digest.date}

Mortgage & Real Estate Digest
🏠

Market Snapshot

${digest.marketSnapshot?.narrative || ''}

${rateRows}
 

Today's Top Stories

${storyCards}
 

What to Watch Today

${watchItems}
${digest.closingNote ? `

${digest.closingNote}

` : ''}

JWH Financial · Mortgage & Real Estate Digest

mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com

HousingWire · MND · MBS Live · NMP · Fed · CFPB · Freddie Mac · Fannie Mae
MBA · NAR · Inman · Zillow · Redfin · NAHB · CoStar · BLS · Census · Conference Board · Bloomberg RE · WSJ Housing

Summaries are independently generated. All rights belong to original publishers.

Unsubscribe
 
`; return [{ json: { html, subject: digest.subject || `🏠 Mortgage & Real Estate Digest — ${digest.date}`, digest } }];

nodes.name: Build HTML Email
nodes.notes: JWH Financial brand palette. Navy #0D1321, Royal Blue #3B6FE8, Light grey bg #EEF0F5. Update UNSUBSCRIBE_WEBHOOK with your actual n8n URL.

nodes.name: Split Subscribers
nodes.notes: Loops through each subscriber one at a time. Increase batchSize to 10-50 for larger lists if Gmail rate limits allow.

nodes.name: Send via Gmail
nodes.notes: Sends from the Gmail account authorized via OAuth2. To send FROM mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com, first add it as a 'Send mail as' alias in Gmail Settings → Accounts and Import, verify it, then add 'fromEmail: mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com' to the options above. The senderName shows 'Mortgage Digest | JWH Financial' in the inbox.

nodes.name: Signup Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives signups from the landing page. After deploying, copy this URL and paste it into the WEBHOOK_URL variable in digest-signup.jsx

nodes.name: Validate Signup
nodes.notes: 4-layer email validation: (1) strict format, (2) disposable domain block, (3) typo detection, (4) MX record check via DNS-over-HTTPS. Returns valid:false with specific error message on failure. MX check failures (network) allow through — bounce handler is the safety net.

nodes.name: Valid?
nodes.notes: Routes valid signups (valid=true) to TRUE branch → Save to Google Sheet. Condition: {{ $json.valid }} is true (boolean, loose validation). TRUE → Save to Sheet. FALSE → Webhook Response (error).

nodes.name: Save to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Append or Update on email — prevents duplicate subscribers and re-activates resubscribers. Matches on email column by header name.

parameters.subject: Welcome to the Daily Mortgage Digest
parameters.message:
={{ '
 

JWH Financial · Daily Briefing

Mortgage & Real Estate Digest

🏠

Hi ' + $('Validate Signup').item.json.firstName + ', you're in.

The latest digest is already on its way to your inbox. Going forward, your Daily Mortgage & Real Estate Digest arrives every weekday at 6 AM Pacific. Each edition includes:

·Current mortgage rates & MBS pricing
·Top 8–12 stories from 20 industry sources
·Fed & regulatory updates
·First & second order effects analysis
·Dedicated insights for realtors & agents
·What to watch for the trading day

Know a colleague who'd find this useful? Forward them this email.

JWH Financial · Mortgage & Real Estate Digest

mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com

Unsubscribe
 
' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ $json.valid ? JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Subscribed!' }) : JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error }) }}

nodes.name: Unsubscribe Webhook
nodes.notes: GET request so clicking the email link works directly in browser. URL: https://YOUR-N8N/webhook/digest-unsubscribe?email=user@example.com

parameters.responseBody:
👋

You've been unsubscribed.

You won't receive any more emails from the Mortgage Digest. If this was a mistake, visit the signup page to re-subscribe.

Mortgage Digest — JWH Financial

nodes.name: Save Digest to Sheet
nodes.notes: Appends today's digest HTML and subject to the 'Digest' tab with a timestamp. References columns by header name. Unlimited history — one row per day. Used by the signup flow to send the latest digest to new subscribers immediately.

nodes.name: Fetch Latest Digest
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from the Digest tab. The next node picks the most recent by timestamp. References columns by header name (timestamp, subject, html).

nodes.name: Get Most Recent Digest
nodes.notes: Sorts all Digest tab rows by timestamp descending and returns the most recent. Sets hasDigest=false if no digest has been stored yet so the send step is skipped gracefully.

nodes.name: Has Digest?
nodes.notes: If a digest has been stored, send it immediately to the new subscriber. If not (first-ever signup before any digest has run), skip the send gracefully.

nodes.name: Send Latest Digest to New Subscriber
nodes.notes: Sends the most recent digest immediately after signup. Subject and HTML are pulled from the Digest tab by header name. Sends from mortgage-digest@jwhfinance.com.

nodes.name: Read PromptConfig
nodes.notes: Reads the editorial prompt block (row where key=editorial) from PromptConfig tab. The Gemini node injects this via {{ $(\'Read PromptConfig\').first().json.value }}. Lets the prompt be tuned in the sheet without editing the node.

main.node: Send Latest Digest to New Subscriber
